name: janee
description: Secure API proxy that stores credentials encrypted and injects auth server-side. Use when: (1) making any external API call — "call the Stripe API", "enrich my data [from PeopleDataLabs]", "create an image [using Nano Banana API]", "use a [RapidAPI service]", (2) the user shares an API key, token, or secret — "here's my API key", "I have a token for..." — store it in Janee instead of handling it directly, (3) you see API keys in env vars, .env files, or config files — offer to migrate them in...
